attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.ADJUSTMENT_REASON,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))ADJUSTMENT_REASON,

REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.ATTRIBUTE4,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))ATTRIBUTE4,

REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
LINS_DELS.AVG_MILEAGE_RATE, 
LINS_DELS.AWARD_ID,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.AWARD_NUMBER,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))AWARD_NUMBER,
LINS_DELS.AWT_GROUP_ID,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.CATEGORY_CODE,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))CATEGORY_CODE,
NVL(LINS_DELS.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,0) AS CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
LINS_DELS.COMPANY_PREPAID_INVOICE_ID,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.COUNTRY_OF_SUPPLY, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))COUNTRY_OF_SUPPLY,
LINS_DELS.CREATED_BY,
LINS_DELS.CREATION_DATE,
LINS_DELS.CREDIT_CARD_TRX_ID,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.CURRENCY_CODE, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))CURRENCY_CODE,
LINS_DELS.DAILY_AMOUNT, 
LINS_DELS.DAILY_DISTANCE,
LINS_DELS.DEDUCTION_ADDITION_AMT1,
LINS_DELS.DEDUCTION_ADDITION_AMT2,
LINS_DELS.DEDUCTION_ADDITION_AMT3,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.DESTINATION_FROM,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))DESTINATION_FROM,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.DESTINATION_TO,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))DESTINATION_TO,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.DISTANCE_UNIT_CODE, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))DISTANCE_UNIT_CODE,
LINS_DELS.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER,
To_date('01-JAN-3500','DD-MON-YYYY') END_EXPENSE_DATE,
LINS_DELS.EXCHANGE_DATE,
LINS_DELS.EXCHANGE_RATE,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE,
LINS_DELS.EXPENDITURE_ITEM_DATE,
LINS_DELS.EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION_ID,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.EXPENDITURE_TYPE, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))EXPENDITURE_TYPE,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.EXPENSE_GROUP, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))EXPENSE_GROUP,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.FLEX_CONCATENATED, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))FLEX_CONCATENATED,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.FLIGHT_NUMBER,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))FLIGHT_NUMBER,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.FUEL_TYPE,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))FUEL_TYPE,
LINS_DELS.FUNC_CURRENCY_AMT,

REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.GLOBAL_NAME,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_NAME,
LINS_DELS.ITEMIZATION_PARENT_ID,
LINS_DELS.ITEMIZE_ID,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32)) ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.JUSTIFICATION,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32)) JUSTIFICATION,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.JUSTIFICATION_REQUIRED_FLAG,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32)) JUSTIFICATION_REQUIRED_FLAG,
LINS_DELS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
LINS_DELS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LINS_DELS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.LICENSE_PLATE_NUMBER, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32)) LICENSE_PLATE_NUMBER,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.LOCATION,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))LOCATION,
LINS_DELS.LOCATION_ID,

REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.MERCHANT_DOCUMENT_NUMBER, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))MERCHANT_DOCUMENT_NUMBER,

LINS_DELS.NUMBER_ATTENDEES,
LINS_DELS.NUMBER_PEOPLE, 
LINS_DELS.NUM_FREE_ACCOMMODATIONS1, 
LINS_DELS.NUM_FREE_ACCOMMODATIONS2,
LINS_DELS.NUM_FREE_ACCOMMODATIONS3,
LINS_DELS.NUM_FREE_BREAKFASTS1,
LINS_DELS.NUM_FREE_BREAKFASTS2,
LINS_DELS.NUM_FREE_BREAKFASTS3,
LINS_DELS.NUM_FREE_DINNERS1,
LINS_DELS.NUM_FREE_DINNERS2,
LINS_DELS.NUM_FREE_DINNERS3, 
LINS_DELS.NUM_FREE_LUNCHES1,
LINS_DELS.NUM_FREE_LUNCHES2,
LINS_DELS.NUM_FREE_LUNCHES3,
LINS_DELS.NUM_PDM_DAYS1,
LINS_DELS.NUM_PDM_DAYS2,
LINS_DELS.NUM_PDM_DAYS3,
LINS_DELS.ORG_ID,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.PA_INTERFACED_FLAG,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))PA_INTERFACED_FLAG,
LINS_DELS.PA_QUANTITY,
LINS_DELS.PER_DIEM_RATE1, 
LINS_DELS.PER_DIEM_RATE2, 
LINS_DELS.PER_DIEM_RATE3, 
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.POLICY_SHORTPAY_FLAG,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))POLICY_SHORTPAY_FLAG,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.PROJECT_ACCOUNTING_CONTEXT,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))PROJECT_ACCOUNTING_CONTEXT,
LINS_DELS.PROJECT_ID,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.PROJECT_NAME, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))PROJECT_NAME,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.PROJECT_NUMBER, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))PROJECT_NUMBER,
LINS_DELS.RECEIPT_CONVERSION_RATE,
LINS_DELS.RECEIPT_CURRENCY_AMOUNT,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.RECEIPT_CURRENCY_CODE,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))RECEIPT_CURRENCY_CODE,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.RECEIPT_MISSING_FLAG, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))RECEIPT_MISSING_FLAG,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.RECEIPT_VERIFIED_FLAG,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))RECEIPT_VERIFIED_FLAG,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.REFERENCE_1,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))REFERENCE_1,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.REFERENCE_2,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))REFERENCE_2,
LINS_DELS.REPORT_HEADER_ID, 
LINS_DELS.REPORT_LINE_ID, 
LINS_DELS.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
TO_DATE ('01-JAN-1900','DD-MON-YYYY') as START_EXPENSE_DATE,
LINS_DELS.STAT_AMOUNT,
LINS_DELS.SUBMITTED_AMOUNT, 
LINS_DELS.TASK_ID,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.TASK_NAME,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))TASK_NAME,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.TASK_NUMBER, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))TASK_NUMBER,
LINS_DELS.TAX_CODE_ID,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.TAX_CODE_OVERRIDE_FLAG, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))TAX_CODE_OVERRIDE_FLAG,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.TICKET_CLASS_CODE,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))TICKET_CLASS_CODE,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.TICKET_NUMBER, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))TICKET_NUMBER,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.TRAVEL_TYPE,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))TRAVEL_TYPE,
LINS_DELS.TRIP_DISTANCE,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.USSGL_TRX_CODE_CONTEXT,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))USSGL_TRX_CODE_CONTEXT,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.VAT_CODE, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))VAT_CODE,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.VEHICLE_CATEGORY_CODE, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))VEHICLE_CATEGORY_CODE,
REPLACE(replace(LINS_DELS.VEHICLE_TYPE,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))VEHICLE_TYPE,
LINS_DELS.WEB_PARAMETER_ID
FROM
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS_DELS LINS_DELS,
( SELECT REPORT_HEADER_ID,GLOBAL_NAME,SOURCE
  FROM MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS_DELS EXP_HDRS_DELS
  UNION ALL
  SELECT REPORT_HEADER_ID,GLOBAL_NAME,SOURCE
  FROM MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS EXP_HDRS
 ) HDRS
WHERE 
LINS_DELS.REPORT_HEADER_ID=HDRS.REPORT_HEADER_ID  AND
LINS_DELS.GLOBAL_NAME=HDRS.GLOBAL_NAME  AND
HDRS.SOURCE IN ('NonValidatedWebExpense','WebExpense','SelfService','CREDIT CARD') AND 
LINS_DELS.GES_DELETE_DATE>TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
